quick_skim.title: Constant Time-Delay Leader Following with Neural Networks and Invariant Extended Kalman Filters for Arbitrary Trajectories
quick_skim.abstract: This paper proposes a constant time-delay trajectory tracking method for vehicle convoys operating without inter-vehicle communication, a common coordinate system, or global positioning. The method integrates a probabilistic sequence-to-sequence (Seq2Seq) neural network with an invariant extended Kalman filter (IEKF) to warm-start the prediction process, allowing accurate estimation of a leader vehicle's relative trajectory on the SE(2) manifold. A geometric model predictive controller is further incorporated to fully exploit the manifold-based trajectory predictions for improved control performance. The system can handle arbitrary nonlinear trajectories with varying speeds and motion profiles while reducing the need for expert-based domain knowledge for the design of trajectory following systems, even under long trajectory delays. The effectiveness of the method is validated through comparisons with a pure IEKF baseline, learning-based methods, and the ground-truth trajectory in kinematic simulations, as well as in experiments using real robotic vehicles.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: neural network for trajectory prediction and control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于轨迹预测和控制的神经网络
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于轨迹预测和控制的神经网络
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于轨迹预测和控制的神经网络
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Integrates Seq2Seq neural network with IEKF and geometric MPC for constant time-delay leader following without inter-vehicle communication.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对无通信、无公共坐标系的车辆队列恒定时延轨迹跟踪问题，提出了一种将概率序列到序列（Seq2Seq）神经网络与不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（IEKF）相结合的方法，用于预热预测过程，准确估计领航车在SE(2)流形上的相对轨迹。进一步结合几何模型预测控制器，充分利用流形预测提高控制性能。系统可处理任意非线性轨迹。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对无通信、无公共坐标系的车辆队列恒定时延轨迹跟踪问题，提出了一种将概率序列到序列（Seq2Seq）神经网络与不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（IEKF）相结合的方法，用于预热预测过程，准确估计领航车在SE(2)流形上的相对轨迹。进一步结合几何模型预测控制器，充分利用流形预测提高控制性能。系统可处理任意非线性轨迹。

quick_skim.title: Transient-Safe Platooning via Dynamic Headway
quick_skim.abstract: Managing autonomous vehicle platoons requires a delicate balance between string stability and rigorous safety. This challenge is intensified by aggressive transients, such as highway merging. Although Constant Time Headway (CTH) spacing is the industry standard for Cooperative Adaptive Cruise Control, it lacks formal safety guarantees during significant velocity deviations. This letter proposes a computationally efficient control framework that considers a linear time-invariant model for the dynamics of each vehicle, while ensuring formal transient safety and stability. By introducing a spacing policy that naturally converges to CTH at steady state, we establish platoon safety as an inductive property. We derive a non-linear and saturated control law for the lead follower and provide sufficient initial conditions to guarantee velocity non-negativity and safety throughout the platoon for any CTH-based followers' control law. Numerical examples indicate the proposed methodology may be applicable even under non-nominal setups.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: safe platooning control with formal guarantees
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 具有形式化保证的队列安全控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 具有形式化保证的队列安全控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 具有形式化保证的队列安全控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a dynamic headway spacing policy for formal transient safety and stability in vehicle platoons, deriving a nonlinear saturated control law.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对自动驾驶车辆队列在激进瞬态（如高速合并）下的安全问题，提出了一种基于动态车头时距的间距策略，在稳态时自然收敛到固定时间间距。通过将队列安全性建立为归纳性质，推导了非线性饱和控制律，确保了形式化的瞬态安全和稳定性。仿真验证了方法的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对自动驾驶车辆队列在激进瞬态（如高速合并）下的安全问题，提出了一种基于动态车头时距的间距策略，在稳态时自然收敛到固定时间间距。通过将队列安全性建立为归纳性质，推导了非线性饱和控制律，确保了形式化的瞬态安全和稳定性。仿真验证了方法的有效性。
